Structural pivot: Far below spot, confirms positive gamma regime and market stability.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Suppressed volatility expected - positive GEX environment with dealers long gamma. Spot trading above all major CALL walls, creating stable price action with downside support.
outlook.summary: Spot at 6437.25 trades above all significant CALL OI concentrations. Extremely low PCR (0.03-0.04) combined with reverse smirk skew confirms aggressive bullish positioning. 6200 emerges as RESONANCE level across all expiries - critical structural support. Weekly CALL wall at 6350-6375 provides near-term floor. No visible resistance above from options structure. Volume PCR >1.0 suggests hedging despite low OI PCR - watch for potential mean reversion if sentiment extremes persist.

levels.motivazione: Significant CALL OI across ALL three expiries (0DTE: 51 VOL, Weekly: 64 VOL, Monthly: 208 OI). Highest Monthly concentration. Dealers hedged below spot creates magnetic support zone.
Highest Weekly CALL OI (305). Primary near-term support below spot. Concentrated dealer positioning creates structural floor.
Structural gamma equilibrium point across all expiries. Spot trading 17% above in positive gamma territory - suppresses volatility, stabilizes uptrend.
Second highest Weekly CALL OI (244). Confluence with 6350 creates support cluster. Volume/OI suggests active positioning.
Highest 0DTE CALL OI (134). Deep intraday support anchor. Extreme distance from spot limits immediate relevance.
